string.name: legal_privacy_body
string.value:
Demo translation notice: This English text is provided only for this non-production demo and is not a formally reviewed legal document.

Last updated: December 24, 2025

Introduction

Guangdong COROS Sports Technology Co., Ltd. (“**COROS**” or “**we**”) places great importance on the **privacy and personal information protection** of users (“**you**”). We will make every reasonable effort to protect your personal information in accordance with applicable laws and regulations.

This Personal Information Protection Policy (“**Policy**”) applies when you use our products and services through the COROS website, the **COROS App**, and other COROS products and services.

This Policy explains how we **collect, store, use, provide, and delete** your information and describes your rights. Please read and understand this Policy carefully, especially the provisions concerning **sensitive personal information, system permissions, third-party sharing, and account deletion**.

## 1. How We Collect and Use Personal Information

1. We describe the **types of personal information** collected and their uses so that you can understand the categories of information processed by each feature, the purposes of processing, and the processing methods.

2. To provide workout records, device connections, account sign-in, security, and customer support, we may process account information, device information, workout data, network status, and necessary log information **after receiving authorization**.

## 2. How We Provide and Share Personal Information

**Unless you consent**, we will not voluntarily provide your personal information to third parties outside COROS. If external provision is necessary, or if you ask us to provide information to a third party, we will obtain your consent directly unless otherwise required by law.

## 3. How You Can Manage Personal Information

You may use the methods described in this Policy to **access, update, copy, or delete** your personal information, withdraw consent, delete your account, or submit complaints and reports. We will process requests within the periods required by applicable laws and regulations.

## 4. System Permissions and Sensitive Information

To collect information under this Policy, provide and improve services, and protect account security, we may request relevant **system permissions**. Sensitive permissions, such as location, **are not enabled by default** and are used only within the scope to which you explicitly consent.

## 5. How This Policy Is Updated

We will continue to protect your personal information and may update this Policy because of product changes, laws, regulations, or regulatory requirements. If a **material change** occurs, we will notify you in a reasonable manner.

string.name: legal_service_terms_body
string.value:
Demo translation notice: This English text is provided only for this non-production demo and is not a formally reviewed legal document.

Last updated: September 4, 2023

Special Notice:

This COROS User Agreement (“**Agreement**”) is entered into between you (“**User**”) and Guangdong COROS Sports Technology Co., Ltd. (“**COROS**” or “**we**”) concerning your use of the COROS website, the **COROS App**, and other COROS products and services (collectively, “**COROS Products and Services**”).

Please **read and understand this Agreement carefully**, especially provisions shown in bold that exempt or limit COROS liability. You may accept or reject this Agreement. **Unless you accept all terms, you may not register, sign in to, or use COROS Products and Services.**

When you click “I have read and agree to all terms of this Agreement” and complete registration, you are considered to have fully read, understood, and accepted all content of this Agreement at that time. **This Agreement then becomes effective between you and COROS**, and you agree to be bound by its terms.

This Agreement includes agreements, rules, announcements, or notices that we have published or may change or publish in the future. Unless the law or this Agreement provides otherwise, such content **becomes effective when published** and forms an inseparable part of this Agreement without separate notice.

If you disagree with this Agreement or with any agreement, rule, announcement, or notice published after your acceptance, you should **sign out, delete your account, and stop using COROS Products and Services**. Continued use means that you continue to accept and comply with all content of this Agreement.

## 1. Scope of Services

1. We grant you a **personal, non-transferable, non-sublicensable, non-exclusive, and revocable** license to use COROS Products and Services.

2. You must use the products and services in accordance with laws, this Agreement, and rules published by COROS. You **may not use the services for unlawful activities or to infringe the lawful rights of others**.

3. We may **adjust, update, or optimize** service content based on product operations and will provide necessary notices within a reasonable scope.

## 2. Account and Security

1. You are responsible for all activity under your account and must **properly safeguard your account, password, and verification codes**.

2. If you discover **abnormal account use, theft, or another security risk**, contact us promptly.

## 3. Changes to This Agreement

We may **modify this Agreement** because of changes in laws or regulations, business adjustments, or service improvements. The updated Agreement takes effect when published. Continued use of COROS Products and Services means that you accept the updated Agreement.
